title: helianthus laevigatus
intro: Helianthus laevigatus, also known as smooth sunflower, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helianthus laevigatus include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
